title: ByteCosts AI Pricing Index
description: Source-linked AI model pricing snapshot. Top-level object with a rows array.

provider.description: Provider name as represented by ByteCosts.

model.description: Model identifier as published by the provider.

unit.description: Pricing unit. Currently always USD per 1M tokens.

context.description: Context window in tokens, when known.

sourceUrl.description: Provider page the price was read from. Cite this as the price origin.

lastCheckedAt.description: Snapshot regeneration time (equals generatedAt) — NOT a per-row re-verification.

evidenceCheckedAt.description: When this row's price was last verified against its provider source.

confidence.description: Confidence in the row's price provenance.
